who: logistics supervisors at freight brokers processing 10–50 shipments/week
offer: For logistics supervisors at freight brokers processing 10–50 shipments/week, delivery delays cause missed deadlines. We automatically flag delays instead of manual tracking and reporting of delivery times.
problem: Inability to track delivery delays in real-time, leading to missed deadlines.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics supervisors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on logistics tools
DM outreach with demo video to logistics supervisors
Participate in community forums for logistics discussions
try_it: Let users try weekly delivery time reports and manual entry for exceptional cases on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
